data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplified decision-making process reduces user reaction time.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Button size and spacing optimized for touch devices.
data.technical_spec: Larger tappable areas for frequent actions.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Grouping related items to aid user experience.
data.technical_spec: Logical grouping within chat lists and settings.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Limits on-screen information to user memory capacity.
data.technical_spec: Simple menus with quick access to critical features.

data.title: Law of Similarity
data.description: Consistent design elements for better user recognition.
data.technical_spec: Use of familiar icons and consistent color schemes.
